---
title: "CLIF ICU Dashboard"
format: 
  html:
    observablehq: true
    theme: sandstone
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
    html-math-method: katex
    html: 
      allow-raw-html: true
execute:
  enabled: true
  freeze: true
  echo: false
resources:
  - images/
---


# ICU Patient Encounter Characteristics and Outcomes (2020–2021)

The table below showcases the characteristics and outcomes of ICU patient encounters across nine CLIF consortium sites. The cohort includes all adults (≥ 18 years) admitted to an ICU within 48 hours of hospitalization and staying at least 24 hours, from January 1, 2020, to December 31, 2021. This represents a diverse cohort of over 111,000 ICU patient encounters.

```{ojs}
data = FileAttachment("CLIF-TableOne/combined_overall_all_sites.csv").csv()

// Extract university names (i.e., column names excluding 'Characteristic')
universities = Object.keys(data[0]).filter(k => !["Variable", "Consortium Aggregate"].includes(k))

// Dropdown for university selection — default to "Overall" (= Consortium)
viewof selectedUniversity = Inputs.select(
  ["Overall", ...universities], {
    label: "Select University",
    value: "Overall"
  }
)
```

```{ojs}
// Use Consortium values if "Overall" is selected
sourceColumn = selectedUniversity === "Overall" ? "Consortium Aggregate" : selectedUniversity

summary = Object.fromEntries(
  data.map(d => [d.Variable, d[sourceColumn]])
)

extractPercent = str => {
  const match = /\(([^)]+)\)/.exec(str);
  return match ? parseFloat(match[1]) : NaN;
}

donutData = first_intubation_locations
  .map(k => ({
    name: k.replace("First location of intubation n (%):", "").trim(),
    value: extractPercent(summary[k])
  }))
  .filter(d => !isNaN(d.value))


// // first intubation categories you'd like to include
first_intubation_locations = [
    "First location of intubation n (%): icu",
    "First location of intubation n (%): ed",
    "First location of intubation n (%): procedural",
    "First location of intubation n (%): stepdown",
    "First location of intubation n (%): ward",
 ]

// Initial mode for IMV categories
imv_modes = [
  "Initial mode for IMV n (%): assist control-volume control",
  "Initial mode for IMV n (%): simv",
  "Initial mode for IMV n (%): pressure support/cpap",
  "Initial mode for IMV n (%): No mode documented",
  "Initial mode for IMV n (%): pressure control",
  "Initial mode for IMV n (%): other",
  "Initial mode for IMV n (%): pressure-regulated volume control",
  "Initial mode for IMV n (%): volume support"
]

imvDonutData = imv_modes
  .map(k => ({
    name: k.replace("Initial mode for IMV n (%):", "").trim(),
    value: extractPercent(summary[k])
  }))
  .filter(d => !isNaN(d.value))


```

```{ojs}
htl.html`
<div style="height: 2rem;"></div>

<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem 2rem; font-family: sans-serif;">

  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/totalicus.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["N: ICU encounters"]}</strong><br/>Total ICU encounters</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ttl_patients.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["N: unique patients"]}</strong><br/>Total unique patients</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/gender.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["Sex n (%): Female"]}%</strong><br/>Female</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/race.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-around; width: 100%;">
      <div><strong>${summary["Race n (%): Black"]}%</strong><br/>Black</div>
      <div><strong>${summary["Race n (%): White"]}%</strong><br/>White</div>
      <div><strong>${summary["Race n (%): Other"]}%</strong><br/>Other</div>
    </div>
    <strong>Race</strong><br/>
  </div>

  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["Ethnicity n (%): Hispanic"]}</strong><br/>Ethnicity: Hispanic</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["Total ICU days, median [Q1,Q3]"]}</strong><br/>Total ICU days</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["Total hospital days, median [Q1,Q3]"]}</strong><br/>Total hospital days</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/death.jpg" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["Hospital mortality n (%)"]}</strong><br/>Mortality</div>
  </div>

  <div style="text-align: center;">
   <strong>Admission Location</strong>
   <table style="border: 1px solid black; border-collapse: collapse;">
     <thead>
       <tr>
         <th style="border: 1px solid black; padding: 8px;">Location</th>
         <th style="border: 1px solid black; padding: 8px;">n (%)</th>
       </tr>
     </thead>
     <tbody>
       ${[
         "Admission Location n (%): ed",
         "Admission Location n (%): procedural",
         "Admission Location n (%): icu",
         "Admission Location n (%): stepdown",
         "Admission Location n (%): ward",
         "Admission Location n (%): psych",
         "Admission Location n (%): other"
       ].map(key => {
         // Extract location name by removing the prefix
         const locationName = key.replace('Admission Location n (%): ', '');
         const value = summary[key];
         return htl.html`<tr><td style="border: 1px solid black; padding: 8px;">${locationName}</td><td style="border: 1px solid black; padding: 8px;">${value}</td></tr>`;
       })}
     </tbody>
   </table>
 </div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["Vasopressor encounters n (%)"]}%</strong><br/>Vasopressor encounters n (%)</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["Dopamine dose, median [Q1,Q3]"]}%</strong><br/>Dopamine dose, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["Epinephrine dose, median [Q1,Q3]"]}%</strong><br/>Epinephrine dose, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["Norepinephrine dose, median [Q1,Q3]"]}%</strong><br/>Norepinephrine dose, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["Phenylephrine dose, median [Q1,Q3]"]}%</strong><br/>Phenylephrine dose, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["Vasopressin dose, median [Q1,Q3]"]}%</strong><br/>Vasopressin dose, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["Angiotensin dose, median [Q1,Q3]"]}</strong><br/>Angiotensin dose, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["IMV encounters n (%)"]}</strong><br/>MV encounters n (%)</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["fio2_set, median [Q1,Q3]"]}</strong><br/>fio2_set, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["peep_set, median [Q1,Q3]"]}</strong><br/>peep_set, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["resp_rate_set, median [Q1,Q3]"]}</strong><br/>resp_rate_set, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;">
    <img src="../images/ethnicity.png" style="width: 96px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
    <div><strong>${summary["tidal_volume_set, median [Q1,Q3]"]}</strong><br/>tidal_volume_set, median [Q1,Q3]</div>
  </div>
</div>

`

htl.html`<div style="height: 2rem;"></div>`
```

```{ojs echo: false}
// Inject donutData as JSON into HTML for D3 to read
htl.html`<script id="donut-data" type="application/json">${JSON.stringify(donutData)}</script>`

```

```{ojs}
//| label: first-intube-chart
//| output: html

import {htl} from "@observablehq/runtime"

chart = {
  const width = 300;
  const height = 350;  // Increased height to accommodate text below
  const radius = Math.min(width, height) / 2;

  // Create main SVG with extra width for legend
  const svg = d3.create("svg")
    .attr("width", width + 200) // Add extra width for legend
    .attr("height", height)
    .attr("viewBox", [0, 0, width + 200, height])
    .style("max-width", "100%")
    .style("height", "auto");

  // Create a group for the donut chart and center it
  const chartGroup = svg.append("g")
    .attr("transform", `translate(${width/2}, ${height/2 - 25})`);  // Moved up slightly to make room for text

  const arc = d3.arc()
    .innerRadius(radius * 0.6)
    .outerRadius(radius);

  const pie = d3.pie()
    .sort(null)
    .value(d => +d.value);

  const color = d3.scaleOrdinal(d3.schemeReds[9]);    // Red gradient

  // Add the pie chart to the centered group
  chartGroup.append("g")
    .selectAll("path")
    .data(pie(donutData))
    .join("path")
      .attr("fill", d => color(d.data.name))
      .attr("d", arc);

  // Add text below the donut
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("x", width/2)
    .attr("y", height - 20)  // Position near bottom of SVG
    .style("font-size", "1.2rem")
    .style("font-weight", "bold")
    .text("First location of intubation");

  // Create legend group
  const legend = svg.append("g")
    .attr("transform", `translate(${width + 20}, 20)`); // Position legend 20px from right edge

  // Add legend items
  donutData.forEach((d, i) => {
    const legendItem = legend.append("g")
      .attr("transform", `translate(0, ${i * 25})`); // Space items 25px apart

    legendItem.append("rect")
      .attr("width", 15)
      .attr("height", 15)
      .attr("fill", color(d.name));

    legendItem.append("text")
      .attr("x", 20)
      .attr("y", 12)
      .style("font-size", "12px")
      .text(d.name);
  });

  return svg.node();
}

display(chart)

```


```{ojs}
//| label: inital-imv-chart
//| output: html

import {htl} from "@observablehq/runtime"

imvChart = {
  const width = 300;
  const height = 350;  // Increased height to accommodate text below
  const radius = Math.min(width, height) / 2;

  // Create main SVG with extra width for legend
  const svg = d3.create("svg")
    .attr("width", width + 200) // Add extra width for legend
    .attr("height", height)
    .attr("viewBox", [0, 0, width + 200, height])
    .style("max-width", "100%")
    .style("height", "auto");

  // Create a group for the donut chart and center it
  const chartGroup = svg.append("g")
    .attr("transform", `translate(${width/2}, ${height/2 - 25})`);  // Moved up slightly to make room for text

  const arc = d3.arc()
    .innerRadius(radius * 0.6)
    .outerRadius(radius);

  const pie = d3.pie()
    .sort(null)
    .value(d => +d.value);

  const color = d3.scaleOrdinal(d3.schemeReds[9]);    // Red gradient
  
  // Add the pie chart to the centered group
  chartGroup.append("g")
    .selectAll("path")
    .data(pie(imvDonutData))
    .join("path")
      .attr("fill", d => color(d.data.name))
      .attr("d", arc);

  // Add text below the donut
  svg.append("text")
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("x", width/2)
    .attr("y", height - 20)  // Position near bottom of SVG
    .style("font-size", "1.2rem")
    .style("font-weight", "bold")
    .text("Initial mode for IMV");

  // Create legend group
  const legend = svg.append("g")
    .attr("transform", `translate(${width + 20}, 20)`); // Position legend 20px from right edge

  // Add legend items
  imvDonutData.forEach((d, i) => {
    const legendItem = legend.append("g")
      .attr("transform", `translate(0, ${i * 25})`); // Space items 25px apart

    legendItem.append("rect")
      .attr("width", 15)
      .attr("height", 15)
      .attr("fill", color(d.name));

    legendItem.append("text")
      .attr("x", 20)
      .attr("y", 12)
      .style("font-size", "12px")
      .text(d.name);
  });

  return svg.node();
}

display(imvChart)

```
